@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	Mail-SpamAssassin
 PORTVERSION=	3.3.2
-PORTREVISION?=	6		# committer: please bump PORTREVISION on Slaves

 CATEGORIES?=	mail perl5
